properties.name: Snow leopard / Manas range (placeholder)
properties.note: Approximate L-shape covering the high-altitude ranges relevant to Manas: Tien Shan (Kyrgyzstan), Pamir (Tajikistan), Hindu Kush (Afghanistan/Pakistan), Karakoram (Pakistan/India), Kashmir, Ladakh, and the Himalaya proper from Nanga Parbat east to Namcha Barwa. Replace with a finer GeoJSON when available.
